name: Nyx Halden
description: Ritualist and lattice weaver. The party's primary healer and resonance caster.

relic_weapon.inlay_effect: Healing wards; mends lattice damage on allies

ability_slots.name: Suture Bloom
ability_slots.description: Heal an ally and grant a protective ward lasting 2 turns.

ability_slots.name: Weave Strike
ability_slots.description: Composed lattice attack. Launches a bolt of resonance energy at target.

ability_slots.name: Anchor Ward
ability_slots.description: Create a damage-absorbing ward on a location. Absorbs up to 30 damage.

ability_slots.name: Binding Circle
ability_slots.description: AoE crowd control. Binds all enemies in area for 1 turn, preventing movement.

ability_slots.name: Threshold Pulse
ability_slots.description: Dispel one negative status effect from an ally as a reaction.

ability_slots.name: Reality Fold
ability_slots.description: Massive AoE resonance detonation. Warps local lattice. Increases CLI by 2.0.
